mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, charge_kind as chargeKind, window_start as windowStart, window_end as windowEnd, inserted_count as insertedCount, skipped_count as skippedCount, drift_count as driftCount, remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime from his_charge_fetch_batch where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} limit 1

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, charge_kind as chargeKind, window_start as windowStart, window_end as windowEnd, inserted_count as insertedCount, skipped_count as skippedCount, drift_count as driftCount, remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime from his_charge_fetch_batch where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
